# GitHub Configuration

This directory contains GitHub-specific configuration files for Hey Mike!

## Files

- `ISSUE_TEMPLATE/` - Issue templates for bug reports and feature requests
- `workflows/` - GitHub Actions CI/CD workflows (future)
- `PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md` - Pull request template (future)

## Repository Setup

This repository is configured for the [Unseenium](https://github.com/Unseenium) organization.
